ai_summary: Kothari Sugars and Chemicals Limited reported a severe operational decline in FY2025-26, with revenue continuing a three-year downward trend and culminating in a pre-tax loss of (263) lakhs. A major red flag is that the reported positive profit after tax (661 lakhs) is entirely due to a substantial deferred tax credit and significant exceptional items, masking the underlying core business unprofitability. This signals a material impact on core financial health and raises concerns about future sustainability.
